title: aster circularis
intro: Aster circularis, also known as the Western Yarrow, is a perennial herb native to North America, characterized by its fern-like foliage and small white or pink flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce fever, and calm digestive issues. The health benefits of Aster circularis include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve menstrual cramps, and support respiratory health, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Aster circularis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
